name: notebook-helper
description: Jupyter notebook authoring, repair, rendering, and local execution guidance for Omiga.

interface.longDescription: Adds an Omiga-native notebook workflow inspired by VS Code Jupyter's split between notebook serialization, cell language detection, output renderers, and kernel/controller execution. Omiga keeps execution local and does not run VS Code extension webviews.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this empty notebook with a Python starter cell.
Repair this ipynb and explain what changed.
Turn this analysis plan into notebook cells.
Explain which notebook outputs require unsupported Jupyter widget renderers.
